title: Hydrangea arborescens 'Pink Annabelle' – Hardy Pink Hydrangea with Giant Blooms – Easy-to-Grow Flowering Shrub – Strong Stems & Repeat Summer Blooms 5 Litre Pot x1 by Thompson & Morgan
features: Vibrant pink blooms up to 30cm in diameter
Flowers reliably on new wood for repeat displays
Suitable for borders or patio containers
description: Hydrangea arborescens 'Pink Annabelle' is a sensational update on the classic 'Annabelle' hydrangea, bringing all the same qualities – and now in vibrant pink! This reliable, hardy shrub produces enormous rounded blooms, up to 30cm across, that cover the plant in a bold flush of colour throughout the summer months. Unlike traditional varieties, 'Pink Annabelle' flowers on new wood, meaning you'll enjoy consistent blooms year after year, no matter how or when you prune it. With sturdy, weather-resistant stems, this hydrangea stands tall and proud, even in wind or rain. Perfect for mixed borders, cottage gardens, or large patio containers, 'Pink Annabelle' is incredibly easy to grow and a true showstopper when in full bloom. Its robust nature and low-maintenance care make it an ideal choice for gardeners of all levels. Whether you're looking to brighten a dull corner or create a feature plant, this hydrangea will reward you with long-lasting flowers and stunning garden impact from early to late summer. How to Grow Instructions: Light: Prefers full sun or partial shade with some shelter. Temperature: Hardy and reliable in UK climates. Watering: Keep soil consistently moist, especially in containers. Feeding: Mulch and feed annually with compost or well-rotted manure. Humidity: Tolerates typical UK garden humidity well. Images shown are for guidance only and show the expected results of plants upon maturity. Different growing conditions might vary results. Image may be included for illustration of supply but can vary due to seasonality changes (e.g. deciduous plants lose leaves in colder months). Decorative pots are not supplied.
